title: ornithogalum turbinatum
intro: Ornithogalum turbinatum, also known as the ornithogalum or star of Bethlehem, is a flowering plant species in the Asparagaceae family, characterized by its star-shaped flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Ornithogalum turbinatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and promote respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be dried and used as a powder for added convenience.
